summary: Diff adds a Motoko backend actor with product CRUD and admin checks, plus a TanStack Router-based frontend with storefront pages, cart UI, admin product editor/table, image upload UI (single image), loading/error components, and header/footer. Several BuildRequest requirements are either not evidenced in the diff or appear only partially implemented (notably product categories/multiple images/stable storage/README/SEO).

missing_requirements.requirement: Cohesive minimalist luxury UI theme across the app (white+beige palette, serif headings, sans body, subtle micro-animations) and fully responsive.
missing_requirements.reason: Some components show serif headings and transitions, but the diff does not evidence global theme tokens/typography setup across all pages or comprehensive responsive styling; key styling may exist in omitted files, so only partial evidence is visible.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend product catalog API with fields: id, title/name, description, price, category (Rings/Necklaces/Earrings/Bracelets), images (one or more), createdAt/updatedAt; persisted in stable storage across upgrades.
missing_requirements.reason: The Product type shown lacks category and supports only a single image field (not multiple). No stable storage (stable vars / preupgrade/postupgrade) is evidenced in the truncated backend snippet.

missing_requirements.requirement: Admin allowlist of principals stored in backend; restrict product mutations to admins; require login for Admin Dashboard using Internet Identity; configure at least one initial admin principal.
missing_requirements.reason: Frontend route guard/login prompt is present, and backend checks `AccessControl.isAdmin`, but the diff does not show how the admin allowlist is stored/persisted, nor how an initial admin principal is configured/managed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Admin can upload multiple product images; store image bytes in-canister and serve back via HTTP/query endpoints; validate type/size with user-friendly errors; storefront renders uploaded images.
missing_requirements.reason: Uploader validates type/size and prepares an `ExternalBlob`, but the UI and backend types indicate only a single image per product (`image`, not `images`). The backend storage/serving interface for in-canister image bytes is not evidenced beyond `MixinStorage` include and use of `Storage.ExternalBlob`.

missing_requirements.requirement: Homepage includes hero banner, featured products, category section (clickable to filtered shop), testimonials, Instagram-style gallery preview, and footer with contact + social links.
missing_requirements.reason: Footer is present, and FeaturedProducts component exists, but the diff does not include the HomePage implementation showing hero banner, categories section with navigation, testimonials, or Instagram-style gallery preview (may be in omitted files).

missing_requirements.requirement: Shop page: responsive grid, category filter, sort by price asc/desc, and Add to cart per product.
missing_requirements.reason: ProductCard includes Add to cart, but the ShopPage implementation (filtering/sorting) is not shown in the diff snippet (may be in omitted files).

missing_requirements.requirement: Product Detail page: image gallery with zoom, description/price/add-to-cart, reviews UI placeholder, related products by same category (excluding current).
missing_requirements.reason: Image zoom component exists and RelatedProducts exists, but RelatedProducts does not use category filtering (it ignores the `category` prop) and simply selects other products. ProductDetailPage and reviews UI are not shown in the diff snippet.

missing_requirements.requirement: Cart page with editable quantities, remove item, total calculation, and persistence across refresh (e.g., localStorage).
missing_requirements.reason: CartLineItem supports quantity updates/removal and shows totals, but no evidence is shown for cart persistence across refresh (implementation likely in `useCart`, not included here).

missing_requirements.requirement: Checkout page with validated shipping form (name, email, address, city, postal code, country) and clearly marked Stripe-ready placeholder; validation errors inline.
missing_requirements.reason: CheckoutPage implementation is not shown in the diff snippet, so shipping form fields/validation and Stripe-ready placeholder are not evidenced.

missing_requirements.requirement: Admin Dashboard: list/table products with edit/delete; create/edit/delete products with fields including title/name, description, price, category selection, and image upload.
missing_requirements.reason: Products table and editor dialog exist with name/description/price and image upload, but no category selection is evidenced. Also image handling appears single-image only.

missing_requirements.requirement: Loading states, subtle transitions, lazy loading with reserved aspect ratio, and friendly error states with retry for failed network calls.
missing_requirements.reason: Skeletons, error state with retry, transitions, and lazy-loading are evidenced for product grids/cards, but it is not shown for all required surfaces (e.g., upload failures with retry, route-level transitions, product detail loading) beyond the provided components; implementation may be elsewhere.

missing_requirements.requirement: SEO/accessibility foundations: per-page titles/meta descriptions, semantic headings, accessible labels/errors, keyboard navigation, meaningful alt text fallback.
missing_requirements.reason: Some accessibility features are present (labels, aria-labels, focus-visible classes, alt attributes), but there is no evidence of per-page document titles/meta descriptions being set. Alt-text fallback logic is not evidenced (alt is passed explicitly from product.name in places, but not shown as a general fallback mechanism).

missing_requirements.requirement: In-repo README explaining local dev/build/deploy to IC and how to configure initial admin principals; describe image storage/limits; clean project structure.
missing_requirements.reason: No README changes are shown in the diff summary, and no documentation about admin principal configuration or image storage/limits is evidenced.

hallucinated_features.description: User profile system (get/save caller user profile) with permission checks.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest focuses on storefront + admin product management and II-based admin auth; user profile CRUD is not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer attribution link to caffeine.ai with UTM parameters.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested as part of homepage/footer requirements (only contact + social links were requested).
